reviews.snippet: I hired a Scooty from Kathgodam and had a great experience. The owner was extremely supportive, polite and cooperative throughout. The process was smooth and perfect. The best part was the price very visible and budget friendly compare to others. If anyone is planning to explore Nainital or nearby areas, I would definitely recommend taking a Scooty from here. Thank you so much

Kamal bhaiya was very helpful and we had a very good tour, all thanks to the condition of the bike. We took bullet classic 350 and it was so comfortable that we took it till ranikhet and above yet as a pillion i had no issues.
Please rent your bikes/scooty from here, they offer very good condition bikes ☺️

We came to Kathgodam from Delhi on 6 May 2026, and from here we hired the services of Mahakaal Tours & Bike Rentals. We visited Kainchi Dham, and the owner of Mahakal Taxi Service, Mr. Deepak Pant, is truly a wonderful person. He guided and accompanied us very nicely throughout the trip. After sightseeing, he safely dropped us back at our hotel.
The next day, on 7 May 2026, he took us to Mukteshwar Dham. After darshan there, he brought us to Nainital and showed us all the beautiful places properly. Later, he also took us to Hanuman Garhi Temple in Nainital, where we had a very peaceful and wonderful darshan. After completing the entire tour, he safely dropped us back at our hotel in Kathgodam.
The tour package provided by Mahakal Taxi Service was very affordable and perfectly suited to my budget.
Whenever any of you plan to visit Uttarakhand — whether Nainital, Mukteshwar, Kainchi Dham, Almora, or any other place in Uttarakhand — you can definitely contact them. I personally had a very good experience, and I hope you all will have a wonderful experience too.
Whenever I visit Uttarakhand again in the future, I will surely take their service again because I truly liked their hospitality and service.
May God always keep them happy, healthy, and successful. This is my heartfelt prayer for them.
I rented a bike here and had an amazing experience. The vehicle was clean, well-serviced, and ready on time. Staff was very cooperative and guided me well. Highly satisfied!

Had a great experience with Mahakaal Tours & Bike Rentals during my trip to Nainital. I booked a scooter from them and traveled across Nainital and nearby places without any issues. The scooter was in excellent condition, well-maintained, and comfortable for long rides. The booking process was smooth, the staff was friendly and helpful, and the pricing was reasonable. Exploring the beautiful hills and lakes on my own scooter made the trip even more enjoyable. I highly recommend Mahakaal Tours & Bike Rentals to anyone looking for a reliable and hassle-free bike rental service in Nainital.

Good bike and scooty are available here book for hassle free ride self drive we got brand new bike and covered munsyari from kathgodam without any problem. Great service. Owner is also very generous. He helped us in rain . Great service overall.

Service is mind blowing. Price is that much reasonable no one can beat. Staff behaviour is very kind, polite & friendly in nature. And even they give you pickup and drop service for free from station to station.
No one market can do that much they did.
Best experience and best customer support with good velue for money
